change_prompt: Improve constitution merge provenance so merged constitutions preserve governance-level metadata instead of only returning conflict bookkeeping. Update the merge path to carry forward the strictest permission ceiling from the inputs, preserve version_name when one side provides it, and append a merge changelog entry plus summary metadata describing merge sources, conflict counts, and acknowledged versus unacknowledged tensions. Add or update focused tests that cover both the returned merge report and the merged Constitution object.
acceptance_criteria: Constitution.merge() preserves the strictest permission ceiling across the two input constitutions in the returned merged Constitution object.
Constitution.merge() preserves a non-empty version_name from either input constitution when the merged constitution would otherwise lose that release label.
The merged Constitution object records merge provenance in its metadata and changelog without removing the existing conflict report fields returned by merge().
Focused tests verify acknowledged and unacknowledged tension reporting as well as the new merged-constitution provenance fields.
rationale: AGENTS.md exists in the package root and documents make test-lite plus pytest usage with --import-mode=importlib. This prompt stays inside packages/acgs-lite, avoids matcher.py hot-path work, and targets Constitution.merge() where the current merge report exposes conflict bookkeeping but the merged Constitution object itself does not preserve governance provenance like permission ceiling, version labels, or a merge changelog entry.
